title: quantile(col, 0) and quantile(col, 1) fail
key_bug_features: quantile function with boundary values fails
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value DECIMAL(10,4) NOT NULL);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value) VALUES (1, 0.0), (2, 1.0), (3, NULL), (4, 0.5);
CREATE TABLE another_table (ref_id INT, FOREIGN KEY (ref_id) REFERENCES test_table(id));
SELECT quantile(value, 0) AS quantile_zero, quantile(value, 1) AS quantile_one FROM test_table;
